title: Vanilla Goat Horn CIT Pack
description: This pack changes the Textures of Goat Horns of Different Types!
body:
## This pack changes the texture of the Goat Horn According to the Type of Goat Horn
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b15ad73a5f8a251b207fdc2297bb01e8f9b1162.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876b6c4641280a1727c0a3b32633bac2812f3c39.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
